metadata.description: A person in their 20s-30s, appearing male, has a warm medium-brown skin tone with visible pores and some small, scattered dark freckles, particularly on the cheeks and forehead. Their face is an oval shape with a defined jawline. Long, dark brown, tightly coiled curly hair frames the face, extending past the shoulders, with a natural hairline. The eyes are almond-shaped and set at a regular width, with striking light green irises and dark limbal rings. Thick, dark, slightly arched eyebrows complement the eyes. The nose is straight with a rounded tip and a moderately broad bridge. The lips are medium-thick with a well-defined cupid's bow. A short, neatly trimmed dark beard and mustache cover the chin and upper lip. The person has a neutral expression and faces directly forward.
metadata.anchor: Striking light green eyes and long dark curly hair.
